name: Target Size (Minimum)
description: The size of the target for pointer inputs is at least 24 by 24 CSS pixels.

ast_heuristics.warning: Found touch target smaller than 24x24px (Tailwind w-6/h-6).

name: Focus Not Obscured
description: When a UI component receives keyboard focus, it is not entirely hidden by author-created content.

ast_heuristics.warning: Check fixed headers/footers to ensure they use scroll-padding to avoid obscuring focused elements.

name: ARIA State Synchronization
description: Dynamic states (expanded, checked, selected) must map to ARIA attributes.

ast_heuristics.warning: Interactive toggle buttons must include aria-expanded or aria-pressed.

name: Screen Reader Exclusivity
description: Visual icons must be hidden from screen readers, and screen-reader-only text must be provided.
